title.en: Deep in the Valley of the Void Demons.

content.en:
Deep in the Valley of the Void Demons.

An ancient demon-level creature with a wolf's head and a snake's tail is frantically attacking the seal here.

Originally, there were countless chains that locked him, and there were hundreds of millions of layers of sealing enchantments, but at this moment, those chains were already half broken, and there were also a large number of cracks in the sealing enchantment.

"Hahaha, give me another period of time, and I can break the seal and get out!"

The ancient demon-level creature Haru roared.

Rumble!

Rumble!

Rumble!

Haru kept attacking, and chain after chain broke.

......

Golden God Department.

An emperor-level came to report a piece of information to the great ancient demon-level existence, Jin Tu.

"Golden Slaughter Ancient Demon Ancestor, the Eagle Department has come to report that the ancient demon-level creatures sealed in the Void Demon Valley are showing signs of getting out of trouble. "

This emperor said.

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon opened his eyes and said lightly: "I know, you go down!"

"Yes, Ancestor!"

This emperor has gone down.

And after this emperor-level left, the Golden Slaughter Ancient Demon muttered to himself, "Who is the ancient demon-level creature in the Void Demon Valley, by the way, it's that guy Haru, I didn't expect this guy to have hope of getting out of trouble, a bit level." "

Wow!

He communicated with several other Ancient Demon-level existences in 023 for a while, and finally decided to let Jiechi, one of the six Ancient Demon-level existences, go over.

Jiechi is good at sealing and formation techniques, no matter what it is, it has reached the level of the ancient demon level.

Therefore, the boundary red can bless the seal in the past.

Wow!

Jiechi quickly rushed to the Void Demon Valley, and in a few breaths, he crossed the territory of hundreds of thousands of tribes, came to the Void Demon Valley, and went straight into the depths of the Void Demon Valley, and saw Haru who was sealed.

At this time, he also saw that those sealing enchantments had been destroyed a lot, and most of the sealing chains had been broken.

If it had been a little longer, Haru would have been able to get out of trouble.

"Haru, you're a bit amazing, you can actually break the seal here!" Jie Chi said with a smile.

"Jiechi, it's you, you have the ability to let me out, we are more powerful than one another!" Haru roared.

Jie Chi smiled and said: "Haru, you have been sealed for countless years, where is my opponent, but I don't need to compete with you, you are sealed here, it is impossible to be released." Otherwise, you will escape, and it will not be easy to catch you again. If it weren't for the agreement of the Aedh Ministry, we would have killed you a long time ago!"

"Hahahaha, do you dare to kill me, if you kill me, your entire Golden God Department will have to be punished by the Luo Mother Lord's Department, even if you won't kill you, you will have to be thrown into the battlefield and sent to the most dangerous place. Haru said.

"So, if I don't kill you, I'll seal you, what can you do?"

Jie Chi said with a smile.

He won't be provoked by Haru, anyway, it was Haru who was sealed, not the Red Ancient Demon of his realm.

"Jiechi, how about you let me go? I can make an oath not to deal with your Golden God Ministry, and I am willing to take out all the treasures I have hidden," Haru pleaded.

"Impossible!"

Jiechi shook his head and rejected Haru's offer.

No matter what treasure Haru came up with, they couldn't have released Haru.

As for the oath, they don't believe it's completely useful, there are too many treasures to counteract the binding effect of the oath.

So, they don't take any chances.

Immediately, Jiechi began to bless the seal.

Airplanes!!!!!

Countless enchantments were restored, and dense chains resealed Haru.

Not only that, but Jiechi also added a new seal, constantly strengthened the seal, and used several treasures to bless it again, making the power of the seal even more terrifying.

"Haru, you can continue to break the seal, but the power of the seal now is three times that of the past, and with your current strength, I am afraid that you will not be able to break the seal. By the way, you can parse the seal, but when you parse it out, an infinite number of years have passed, and maybe at that time, my sealing level has reached the top ancient demon level. Jie Chi said with a smile.

Followed by.

After another period of time, the soldiers of the Eagle Department came to the Void Demon Valley, and when they saw that the Void Demon Valley had returned to normal, they also reported it.

......

"The Void Demon Valley has returned to normal, and it seems that the ancient demon level of the Golden God Department has blessed the seal. "

Ye Tian muttered.

With the seal that was blessed just now, that ancient demon-level creature shouldn't be able to release much power, and it shouldn't be able to kill him now.

Besides, even if he is killed, it will only kill him as a copy of his body.

He was very curious about the situation of that ancient demon-level creature, he had never seen an ancient demon-level creature since he came to this era!

He was going to let his copy body go over, but not with his real identity, in case that ancient demon-level creature leaked his news to the Golden God Ministry, it would not be good.

Thereupon.

He copied a king-level he had seen in the ancient demon-level ruins before, and used the other party's identity to go to the Void Demon Valley.

......

Wow!

Ye Tian came to the Void Demon Valley, and without the slightest hesitation, he directly entered the interior of the Void Demon Valley.

"King!"

"I didn't expect there to be a king-level dare to enter here!"

Just as Ye Tian was approaching the place where the ancient demon-level creature Haru had sealed, Haru tried his best to send out a wisp of power, conjuring up a phantom and enveloping Ye Tian.

"Make the ultimate natal oath, be loyal to me, and swear to save me in the future, and I can spare your life!"

Haru threatened.

"A sealed ancient demon-level creature dares to be so arrogant?"

Ye Tian sneered.

"Look for death!"

The ancient demon-level creature Haru was furious, and tried his best to kill Ye Tian with a wisp of power.

Rumble!!!

A ray of light pierced through Ye Tian, but in the face of this blow, Ye Tian was very calm.

He directly cast the Arrow Mu Blade and shattered this attack with one blow, but this body was relatively fragile, and after casting the Arrow Mother Blade, his body was a little cracked, but he didn't care at all.

Anyway, it was just a copy of the body, and he didn't need to care about the condition of the body.

"The top ultimate arcane, you are such a weak king, and you can still perform this move?"

"No, with the level at which you can create top-notch ultimate arcane, the physical body shouldn't be so weak, you've already perfected the life pattern, and the physical body should be very strong!"

Haru was not dumbfounded, and reacted quickly.

Ye Tian's cultivation and physical body did not match the realm of mastery, as if a terrifying existence occupied this body.

"Which ancient demon-level existence are you, using such a temporary clone to find me?"

Haru guessed and asked.
